meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner)
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Git with AI to overcome a lack of portfolio. A Founder-focused guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to build revenue-generating MVPs.
content.answer_block: To overcome a missing portfolio, use AI to automate Git workflows and ship production-grade code rapidly. By integrating Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you transform your repository into a living proof-of-work, demonstrating technical velocity and SaaS fundamentals that attract investors and high-paying clients immediately.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS landscape is that clients don't care about your resume; they care about your shipping velocity. When you have no portfolio, you are invisible in a crowded market of established builders. The tension between wanting to build and lacking the social proof to sell is where most founders stall and die.

But the rules of the game have changed. By leveraging Git as a high-fidelity record of your engineering process, you can turn your repository into your greatest marketing asset. We are moving beyond simple coding; we are using AI to orchestrate, document, and deploy your path to revenue, effectively bypassing the 'no portfolio' trap by building in public with surgical precision.

steps.title: Establish the MVP Architecture
steps.description: Define the scope of your MVP to ensure you are building a revenue-generating tool, not just a toy project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Architect a lean, high-conversion SaaS MVP for a specific niche. Outline the core database schema, API endpoints, and the primary revenue-generating flow.

steps.title: Automate Repository Boilerplate
steps.description: Speed is your only advantage. Use AI to scaffold a professional, clean repository that adheres to industry standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js repository with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration. Follow clean architecture patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "scaffold project structure with auth and database connectivity"

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'killer feature' that solves the user's pain point and makes your product indispensable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for [Feature]. Ensure it is modular, tested, and follows DRY principles for easy maintenance.

steps.title: Git Commit Hygiene and Documentation
steps.description: Use AI to write descriptive, professional commit messages that tell the story of your build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my recent changes and generate a professional Git commit message following Conventional Commits, emphasizing the business value of these changes.

steps.title: Deploy to Market Validation
steps.description: Push your code to production to gather real-world feedback, which serves as the ultimate portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment guide for Vercel/Supabase and identify the top three metrics I should track to validate my MVP.

pro_tips: Treat your Git history as a narrative; prospective clients check commit frequency to gauge your work ethic.
Use AI to generate README.md files that focus on the 'Why' and the business impact, not just the technical 'How'.
Keep your commits granular; frequent, small commits show consistent progress better than massive, infrequent updates.
Include a 'Business Validation' folder in your repo to store user interview notes and feedback loops.
Leverage Claude Code to automate your deployment pipeline, showing you understand DevOps fundamentals without spending weeks learning them.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the repository link in your LinkedIn profile and reach out to 10 potential users for feedback to start building your actual case study.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of experience hold your revenue potential hostage. Use the power of AI-assisted Git workflows to ship your vision and prove your worth to the world. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
